prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large brown metal cylinder
  - obj_1: small cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_2: small blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small purple rubber cube
  - obj_4: small brown rubber cylinder
  - obj_5: large brown rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: small brown rubber cube
  - obj_7: small purple metal cube
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_9: large blue metal cube

Questions:
[qrr_0101] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0102] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0103] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0104] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0105] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0106] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0107] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0108] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0109] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0110] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0111] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0112] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0113] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0114] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0115] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0116] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0117] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0118] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0119] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0120] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >

I need to analyze the 3D positions of all objects in the scene and answer distance comparison questions.

- obj_1: small cyan rubber sphere (front-right area)

- obj_3: small purple rubber cube (right-back area)
- obj_4: small brown rubber cylinder (front-center area)
- obj_5: large brown rubber cylinder - wait, looking again...

- obj_0: large brown metal cylinder (the golden/brown metal cylinder, center)
- obj_1: small cyan rubber sphere (front right)
- obj_2: small blue rubber cylinder (back)
- obj_3: small purple rubber cube (right back)
- obj_4: small brown rubber cylinder (front center - the one in front)
- obj_5: large brown rubber cylinder - hmm, but I see a small brown cube on left, purple metal cube back-left, cyan metal cylinder back, brown metal cylinder center, brown rubber cylinder front, blue rubber cylinder back, cyan sphere front-right, purple rubber cube back-right, blue metal cube right, brown rubber cylinder right

Wait, obj_5 is "large brown rubber cylinder" - but in the scene I see one brown rubber cylinder in front and one small brown rubber cylinder on the right. Let me reconsider - perhaps obj_5 is the front brown rubber cylinder (which appears larger) and obj_4 is the right brown rubber cylinder.

Let me re-map positions approximately:
- obj_0 (large brown metal cylinder): center, z≈0, x≈-1
- obj_1 (cyan rubber sphere): front-right, x≈2, z≈3
- obj_2 (blue rubber cylinder): back, x≈1, z≈-4

- obj_5 (large brown rubber cylinder): right side, x≈3, z≈1 (the right brown rubber cylinder)
- obj_6 (small brown rubber cube): left, x≈-3, z≈1
- obj_7 (small purple metal cube): back-left, x≈-2, z≈-2
- obj_8 (small cyan metal cylinder): back, x≈0, z≈-3
- obj_9 (large blue metal cube): right, x≈3, z≈0

Now let me estimate distances for each question pair.
